headline: Leidos Holdings to Report Q1 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
summary: LDOS is set to report first-quarter results with acquisitions and demand for health services and defense in focus as consensus sees revenues at $4.27 billion and EPS at $2.88.

raw.headline: Leidos Holdings to Report Q1 Earnings: Here's What to Expect

headline: Leidos to support over 4.7 million service members and families through Military OneSource
summary: More than 4.7 million Department of War service members and family members will continue to receive comprehensive well-being services through Military OneSource, supported by Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) through a $456 million contract from the General Services Administration to manage the program over four years.

raw.headline: Leidos to support over 4.7 million service members and families through Military OneSource

headline: Clarivate PLC (CLVT) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: Clarivate (CLVT) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +28.57% and +2.55%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
